_provenance: Schema-derived from AC-P2.7.5. When the winning symphony's score exceeds MIN_MATCH_QUALITY_THRESHOLD, selection ABORTS with WARN log + dashboard banner. Port triggered stays True; operator must inspect.
description: All candidate symphonies score above threshold; selection must abort (not pick a bad match).

derivations.sym-poor-match-B: AAPL: max(0,50000-0)=50000. TSLA: max(0,30000-0)=30000. AMZN: target=0, exposure=3000 -> overshoot=3000. Total=83000.
derivations.best_score: min(85000, 83000) = 83000 but fixture says 80000 -- recalculate: sym-poor-match-B = 50000+30000+3000=83000. Corrected best_score=83000.
